name: @scorewit/core
description: Sport-agnostic engine for Scorewit daily trivia apps: deterministic ingest → generate → validate → render pipeline, single-file app shell, seeded RNG, streak model, and the generic SportPack interface.
author: Jay

scripts.test: tsx src/contrast.test.ts && tsx src/streak.test.ts && tsx src/bank-target.test.ts && tsx src/seo-pages.test.ts && tsx src/analytics.test.ts && tsx src/insights.test.ts && tsx src/share-line.test.ts
